description: A generic ServiceNow record. The actual fields depend on the table being queried. Common system fields are included in every record.
name: Record

sys_id.description: The unique 32-character system identifier for the record.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time when the record was created.

sys_created_by.description: The user who created the record.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time when the record was last updated.

sys_updated_by.description: The user who last updated the record.

sys_mod_count.description: The number of times the record has been modified.

sys_tags.description: System tags associated with the record.

sys_class_name.description: The table class name for the record.
